message:
fix(web): complete iOS Safari clipboard integration for remaining components

Updates the remaining components to use the centralized copyToClipboard
utility from lib/clipboard.ts for iOS Safari compatibility:

- copy-button.tsx: Main copy button component
- PromptContent.tsx: Prompt detail page copy functionality
- swap-meet/[id]/page.tsx: Community prompt detail page
- CommunityPromptCard.tsx: Community prompt cards
- InstallSkillButton.tsx: Further alignment with shared utility

This completes the clipboard fallback integration started in 2d8a95f.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
